description: Exhaustive ingredient catalog for Indian home and restaurant cooking. Each entry has a stable id, a canonical display name, a category tag, a veg flag, and an array of synonyms (English variants, common misspellings, and Indian regional names) used for name normalization, search, and bill-scan / inventory matching. Synonym matching should be case-insensitive and whitespace/diacritic-insensitive.
matching_notes: Match case-insensitively and ignore whitespace/diacritics. A small set of regional aliases are intentionally ambiguous (listed in ambiguous_aliases) because the same word names different ingredients across Indian languages (e.g. kanda = onion in Marathi but yam elsewhere). For those, prefer an exact canonical-name match; treat a shared synonym hit as lower confidence and disambiguate by category/context.
